name: Tierrous Contaggressive
description:
---

Tierrous Contaggressive

Blood Color: Midblood Teal

Species: Shark-species (like his descender Earth Contaggressive and post-scratch Tierrous, aka Kharvok)

Appearance: Fierce and imposing, Tierrous has a powerful organic form with a sleek prosthetic arm replacing one of his limbs— 

(LOST HIS ARM WHEN HE WAS JUST A GRUB, CAUSE OF HIS SHARKPLANETLINGSPECIES, MIMOSA  A STARLING ALWAYS SAW THAT KHARVOK WAS DEADLY DANGEROUS, SO HE HAD TO CULL IN SOME WAY ALL THE TEALBLOODED SHARKSPECIES, killed/culled Kharvok, Tierrous got his arm chopped off, was an attempt of Mimosa trying to cull Tierrous, and eEarth is next but he doesnt know.)

[HE HAS RED EYES, no pupils, LIKE EARTH HAS AND KHARVOK HAD.]

---

Quadrants and Relationships

Moirallegiance:

Currymp Queecklee (Bronce lowblood Rabbitspecies) — Tierrous’s moirail and emotional anchor. Currymp’s laid-back, swaggy attitude helps balance Tierrous’s severity, calming him and providing steady companionship. Their bond is built on mutual support and deep trust.

Matespritship:

Melanie Femah (Mutant fuschia highblood AlienSpecies) — Tierrous’s passionate and intimate partner. Mely's vulnerable and timid nature brings out Tierrous’s protective side, while Tierrous’s strength offers Mentalien comfort and courage. Their relationship is charged with deep affection and complex emotions.

Kismesis:

Kaliouz Lixfee (Blueblooded catspecies) — A teasing and antagonistic rival. Kaliouz’s playful provocations irritate Tierrous, especially since he dislikes her catlike personality, but their friction fuels a sharp, passionate tension.

Cathun Ringlord /Fuschia HIGHBLOOD! Snakespecies/ — The “douchebag” highblood who treats Mentalien (the “maid”) poorly. Tierrous despises Cathun’s arrogance and cruelty, resulting in a hostile, fiery rivalry.

Close Friends (Non-Quadrant):

Venorik Lupheus /gold lowblood/Wolfspecies — A trusted and close friend, sharing respect and camaraderie without romantic or antagonistic tension.

Janethee Storwirl /Violet highblood/ Owlspecies — More like a maternal figure for Tierrous; wise and caring, Janethee offers guidance and support in a familial way.

Enemies/Disliked:

Tunekan Caniblu [SEA DWELLER DOG LIKE ORCA] — A indigo highblood Tierrous hates. Their relationship is marked by disdain and conflict with no close ties.

//Tierrous also has a katana//

//he mostly discretely enters to the highblood palace where Mely is, but Cathun if he finds out he would cull him, but he makes his life a risk only for her//
